title: justicia caloneura
intro: Justicia caloneura, also known as the Caloneura Justicia or the Yellow Justicia, is a plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, Justicia caloneura is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are said to provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
